name: Navy Federal Credit Union Platinum

welcome_offer.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months on balance transfers made within 60 days of account opening. No balance transfer fee. Expires Jun 30, 2026.

earning_rates.notes: This is a low-interest/balance transfer card, not a rewards card.

other_benefits.name: Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Secondary CDW coverage when renting a car for 15 days or less.

other_benefits.name: Travel and Emergency Assistance
other_benefits.description: Medical referral, lost luggage locator, prescription assistance available 24/7.

notes: Designed for balance transfers and low-interest financing. APR: 10.24%-18.00% variable. Platinum cardholders receive statement credit (not cash back) through Member Deals.
